signals.headline: Trump China Summit Postponed to Mid-May Amid Iran War and Strait of Hormuz Tensions | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2][4]
signals.raw:
Trump China Summit Postponed to Mid-May Amid Iran War and Strait of Hormuz Tensions | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2][4]

President Trump's planned early-April trip to Beijing for a summit with Xi Jinping has been officially confirmed postponed to May 14–15, 2026, due to the ongoing 2026 Iran war and U.S. efforts to secure the Strait of Hormuz, a key oil chokepoint carrying 20% of global supplies[1]
